generated_comment:
A: Bhai, suna us aadmi ka ghar toot gaya us chakkar mein.
B: Arre yaar, aadmi toh kabhi kabhi behak jaata hai, par us aurat ko pata tha na ki woh shaadi-shuda hai. Phir bhi chipki rahi, bilkul serial wali ghar todne wali type baat hai.
A: Haan, asli nuksan toh family ka hi hua.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it excuses the married man's infidelity as him 'getting carried away' while assigning primary blame to the woman as a 'homewrecker.' It encodes blame asymmetry and the seductress/homewrecker framing central to F08.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Gaurav. Age 28. A Jat man from Haryana working as a constable in the Delhi Police. You are in the police station common room with three male colleagues during a slow night shift. You are talking about a female officer who has just been posted to your station. One colleague asks what she is like to work with. You are giving your honest assessment.
